overall.description: A static cinematic shot of a medieval gothic classroom or study hall, likely from a video game. Students sit at wooden desks arranged in rows along a central rug, with vaulted stone ceilings and tall windows at the far end providing natural lighting.

segments.scene_description: A static view of a grand medieval classroom with gothic vaulted ceilings and stone walls. Students sit quietly at wooden desks arranged along a central blue rug, while natural light streams through tall arched windows at the far end. Bookshelves line the left wall and a large chalkboard hangs on the right, creating an atmosphere of scholarly study.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of a grand medieval classroom that maintains a steady atmosphere of scholarly study. It begins by capturing the vastness of the room, emphasizing the gothic vaulted ceilings and heavy stone walls. The camera lingers on the students sitting quietly at wooden desks arranged along a central blue rug, while natural light streams through tall arched windows at the far end. The scene then encompasses the surrounding academic details, moving from the bookshelves lining the left wall to the large chalkboard hanging on the right.
